meta.project: SDI Asih Auladi School Management Platform

product_overview: SDI Asih Auladi is a web-based school management platform that centralizes the school’s public website, academic administration, and role-based dashboards. It supports school information access, PPDB verification, student and teacher data management, attendance, grades, and schedule viewing.
core_goals: Let visitors browse the school’s public information and contact details.
Let users log in and access the dashboard for their role.
Let administrators manage student and teacher records.
Let administrators review and verify PPDB applications.
Let teachers record attendance and student grades for their classes.
Let students view their class schedule.

features.name: Public School Website
features.description: Allows visitors to explore the school’s public-facing information pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the landing page -> Navigate to /profil -> Read the school profile -> Navigate to /visi-misi -> Read the school vision and mission -> Navigate to /berita -> Browse the news list -> Navigate to /galeri -> Browse the gallery -> Navigate to /kontak -> View the contact information

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows users with different roles to sign in with email and password and be sent to the appropriate dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form -> See the role-based dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form -> See access denied for invalid credentials

features.name: Admin Student Management
features.description: Allows administrators to view and add student records.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/admin/siswa -> View the student list -> Start adding a new student -> Fill in the student details -> Save the student record -> See the updated list
Navigate to /dashboard/admin/siswa -> Search for students by name -> View matching student records

features.name: Admin Teacher Management
features.description: Allows administrators to view, add, edit, and remove teacher records.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/admin/guru -> View the teacher list -> Start adding a new teacher -> Fill in the teacher details -> Save the teacher record -> See the updated list
Navigate to /dashboard/admin/guru -> Choose a teacher record to edit -> Update the teacher details -> Save the changes -> See the updated teacher information
Navigate to /dashboard/admin/guru -> Choose a teacher record to remove -> Confirm the deletion -> See the teacher removed from the list

features.name: Admin PPDB Verification
features.description: Allows administrators to review PPDB applications and update their verification status.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/admin/ppdb -> View the application list -> Filter applications by status -> Open an application for verification -> Change the application status -> Save the changes -> See the updated status

Navigate to /dashboard/admin/ppdb -> View the application list -> Open an application for verification -> Change the application status to an allowed value -> Save the changes -> See the updated status

features.name: Teacher Attendance Management
features.description: Allows teachers to record student attendance for a selected class and date.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/guru/absensi -> Select a class -> Select a date -> Review the student list -> Change attendance status for students -> Save attendance data -> See the recorded attendance

Navigate to /dashboard/guru/absensi -> Select a class -> Select a date -> Review the student list -> Change attendance status for students -> Save attendance data -> See the attendance summary for that session

features.name: Teacher Grade Management
features.description: Allows teachers to enter and save student grades for a selected class and subject.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/guru/nilai -> Select a class -> Select a subject -> Review the student list -> Enter grades for students -> Save grade data -> See the recorded grades
Navigate to /dashboard/guru/nilai -> Select a class -> Select a subject -> Review the student list -> Enter grades for students -> Save grade data -> See the updated grade list

features.name: Student Schedule View
features.description: Allows students to view their class schedule.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/siswa/jadwal -> View the class schedule

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials for different roles (admin, guru, siswa, wali)
user_interactions: Redirect to appropriate dashboard based on role

features.name: Admin Student Management
user_interactions: Click Tambah Siswa to open modal

features.name: Admin Teacher Management
user_interactions: Click Tambah Guru to open modal

features.name: Admin PPDB Verification
features.description: View and update status of PPDB applications

features.name: Teacher Attendance Management
features.description: Record student attendance for a class

features.name: Teacher Grade Management
features.description: Record student grades for a subject

known_limitations.issue: Admin Announcement Management is UI-only, not connected to backend API
known_limitations.impact: Create announcements only modify local state, not persisted

known_limitations.issue: Dashboard overviews use dummy or mocked data
known_limitations.impact: Metrics do not reflect real-time database state

known_limitations.issue: Jadwal UI for students and teachers use dummy data
